content.rendered:
ID, amount and purity analysis of rHGH fragment 176-191 and AOD-9604.

This is able to detect and measure both of the substances.

rHGH fragment and AOD-9604 samples can have solubility issues. For this reason, we offer multiple solvents which can be used to choose from for sample preparation. Default option is ultrapure water. If you want to use stronger solvent, please choose either Acetic Acid or DMSO from additional services.

Both DMSO and 5% Acetic Acid should dissolve AOD samples completely, however, there might be differences in results. Using H2O has higher probability of solubility issues.

You can find the test details in the parameters section below.
